name: EmailList
description: List emails from a mailbox folder. Returns sender, subject, date, and UID for each email. Use unseen=true to see only unread emails.

limit.description: Maximum number of emails to return (default: 20)

name: EmailRead
description: Read the full content of an email by its UID. Returns headers and body text.

name: EmailSend
description: Send a new email via SMTP. Supports file attachments.

name: EmailReply
description: Reply to an email by UID. Sends via SMTP with threading headers (In-Reply-To, References). Supports file attachments.

uid.description: UID of the email to reply to

folder.description: Mailbox folder of the original email (default: INBOX)

name: EmailFolders
description: List available IMAP mailbox folders. Use this to discover folder names (e.g. '[Gmail]/Sent Mail') before listing emails in a non-INBOX folder.

name: EmailConfirm
description: Confirm and send a pending email draft by its ID. Use after the user approves an email preview from EmailSend or EmailReply.

name: EmailCancel
description: Cancel and discard a pending email draft by its ID.
